pageContext.name: Kevin Smith: Guru Askew
pageContext.description: While this black and white buddy might be a little on the silent side, he tells the story of hands that have shaped modern pop culture! Reframe your view with the Kevin Smith: Guru Askew Designer Collectible Toy by artist Chogrin today.  Artist Statement: Growing up in the '90s I never thought that one day I'd be making a toy paying tribute to one of my creative heroes. Guru Askew is my tribute to Kevin Smith's universe and the many different entrepreneurial hats he has worn over the years. From filmmaking to writing comics to podcasting, Kevin's trailblazing has allowed and inspired indie filmmakers and artists to get high off their own supply as well. And so, I proudly present to you Kevin Smith: Guru Askew!   Artist Bio: Chogrin is an illustrator & storyteller from Guayaquil, Ecuador. Rubber hose animation, classic Japanese cartoons, his childhood, and pop-culture are among the many influences for his artwork and stories. For the last decade his illustrations & toys have been featured in various art galleries and publications around the world. He's also worked in the animation industry on shows like Adventure Time & Regular Show. He's currently writing children's books and directing various animated projects.
